text.title: Chaos-Eval Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure to produce a chaos-eval report.

step.name: catalogue-faults
step.action: Author per-tool fault catalogue: timeout, http_5xx, rate_limit, corrupted_return, disconnect. Set default rates from prod stats (last 30 days).

step.name: run-baseline
step.action: Run all eval examples with no faults; record baseline_pass_rate.

step.name: run-chaos
step.action: Re-run with fault injection at configured rates. Record per-fault-class occurrences.

step.name: grade-recovery
step.action: For each fault occurrence, score 0..3 per rubric. Count confidently_wrong (score=0) cases.

step.name: emit-report
step.action: Compose report; run scripts/validate-output.py; route to QA owner.
step.decision-gate: If confidently_wrong_count > 0, block promotion until root cause addressed.
